title: CreosotePatch
description: Adds an alternative Create filling recipe that allows using Immersive Engineering creosote to craft TFMG hardened planks.
body:
**Creosote Patch** is a lightweight compatibility mod that allows players to craft _Hardened Planks_ from **"Create: The Factory Must Grow"** using _creosote oil_ from **Immersive Engineering**. By default, TFMG requires its own version of creosote, which is _not_ compatible with other mods. This mod adds an additional recipe that uses **Immersive Engineering's** _creosote_ fluid without modifying or replacing the original recipe.

The patch is safe to add or remove at any time. It does not override fluid tags or interfere with existing content. It simply adds a small data-driven recipe to improve mod interoperability in Forge-based modpacks.
